zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Toose於1496年出生在英國薩默塞特龐迪斯福德 帕克時，她的父親Sir Johannes Toose46歲，母親Johanna Combes43歲。她於1520年與Roger Hill在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1550年2月14日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特萊特林頓聖 瑪麗 抹大拉的 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Toose于1496年出生在英国薩默塞特龐迪斯福德 帕克时，她的父亲Sir Johannes Toose46岁，母亲Johanna Combes43岁。她于1520年与Roger Hill在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1550年2月14日在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特萊特林頓聖 瑪麗 抹大拉的 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Toose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tooze
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Gloucestershire): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Tos(s)e (Old English Tossa, a pet form of Torhtsige, from torht ‘bright’ + sige ‘victory’).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Toose was born in 1496, in Poundisford Park, Somerset, England, her father, Sir Johannes Toose, was 46 and her mother, Johanna Combes, was 43. She married Roger Hill in 1520, in Pitminster, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 February 1550, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Saint Mary Magdalene Church, Taunton, So: St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Toose est née en 1496, à Poundisford Park, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Johannes Toose, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Johanna Combes, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Hill en 1520, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 février 1550, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Mary Magdalene Church, Taunton, So: St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Toose 1496 in Poundisford Park, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Johannes Toose 46 und ihre Mutter Johanna Combes 43. Sie hat 1520 in Pitminster, Somerset, England Roger Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Februar 1550 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Toose è nata il nel 1496 nel Poundisford Park, Somerset, England, sua padre, Sir Johannes Toose, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Johanna Combes, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Roger Hill nel 1520, nel Pitminster, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1550, nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Tooseが1496年にイギリスソメルセトポウンディスフォード パークで生まれた時，父Sir Johannes Tooseは46歳，母Johanna Combesは43歳であった。1520年にイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターでRoger Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1550年2月14日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトウリスリントンスト マリー マグダリーン チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary Magdalene Church, Taunton, So: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 리슬링턴 스트 메리 막달레나 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margery Toose(이)가 1496년 영국 서머세트 파우디스퍼드 박에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Johannes Toose(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Combes(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에서 Roger Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1550년 2월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 리슬링턴 스트 메리 막달레나 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.Saint Mary Magdalene Church, Taunton, So: St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Toose nasceu em 1496, em Poundisford Park, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Johannes Toose, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Combes, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Hill em 1520, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1550, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary Magdalene Church, Taunton, So: ст мэри магдеилин чурч, ритлингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Toose родилась в 1496 г. в местности поундисфорд парк, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Johannes Toose было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Combes, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Hill в 1520 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 февраля 1550 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри магдеилин чурч, ритлингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Toose nació en 1496, en Poundisford Park, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Johannes Toose, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Johanna Combes, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Roger Hill en 1520, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1550, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
